# Lunar Cycle of Faith
## Scripture
"The lord by wisdom founded the earth; by understanding he established the heavens; by his knowledge the depths were broken up, and the skies drop down the dew." - Proverbs 3:19-20

## Reflection
As we observe the phases of the moon, we're reminded of the ebbs and flows of our faith journey. Just as the moon waxes and wanes, our spiritual lives experience seasons of growth and refinement. In the fullness of faith, we shine bright, reflecting God's glory. In the darkness, we may feel lost, but even then, God's wisdom and understanding are at work, establishing and guiding us. The lunar cycle teaches us to trust in God's sovereignty, just as the skies drop down the dew, nourishing the earth below.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we gaze upon the night sky and the ever-changing moon, remind us of Your wisdom and understanding that founded the earth and established the heavens. Help us to trust in Your sovereignty, even in the darkest phases of our faith journey. Just as the lunar cycle brings new life and growth, may our spiritual lives be refreshed and renewed by Your presence. May we reflect Your glory, and may our hearts be filled with the dew of Your nourishing love. Amen.
